summary: Iteration 13 testing completed. Admin Beat Manager page fully tested. Found and FIXED critical bug: API URL was doubled in handleCreate function (${API}/api/beats instead of ${API}/beats). After fix, all CRUD operations work correctly. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working after bug fix.

bugs_fixed.issue: API URL doubled - was ${API}/api/beats, should be ${API}/beats
bugs_fixed.impact: Create beat was returning 404 Not Found

passed_tests: POST /api/beats as admin creates beat successfully
PUT /api/beats/{id} as admin updates beat successfully
DELETE /api/beats/{id} as admin deletes beat successfully
Frontend: Admin Beat Manager page loads at /admin/beats
Frontend: Beat Manager nav link visible in admin sidebar
Frontend: Add Beat button visible and functional
Frontend: Create beat via modal form works (after fix)
Frontend: Edit beat via modal form works
Frontend: Delete beat with confirmation works
Frontend: Non-admin users redirected from /admin/beats to /dashboard
seed_data_creation: Test beats created during testing (TEST_UI_Beat_Fixed, TEST_UI_Beat_Edited, TEST_AdminBeat_*, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested Admin Beat Manager page. Fixed critical bug where create beat API call used wrong URL (${API}/api/beats instead of ${API}/beats). All CRUD operations now working: create, edit, delete beats. Non-admin users correctly redirected away from /admin/beats. Audio upload endpoint tested for auth requirements. Demo beats seeded on startup (6 beats). Test beats from iterations 12-13 may exist in DB.

mocked_apis.Resend Email: Email sending is skipped (no API key)

admin_beat_manager_page.nav_link: Beat Manager nav item visible in admin sidebar
admin_beat_manager_page.beats_list: Shows all beats from database with play count, pricing, audio status
admin_beat_manager_page.create_beat: Add Beat button opens modal, form creates beat via POST /api/beats
admin_beat_manager_page.edit_beat: Edit button opens modal with pre-filled data, updates via PUT /api/beats/{id}
admin_beat_manager_page.delete_beat: Delete button with confirmation, removes via DELETE /api/beats/{id}
